rationale: The citation appears in the Method/Data Collection section with a specific procedural role, not just as background. The authors explicitly state that when syndicated data were unavailable, they collected archival data in line with Golder (2000) suggested rules. This indicates direct methodological use in building their dataset. While not central to their theory tests, the reference meaningfully informs evidence construction.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Golder (2000) methodological guidance for archival data collection when standard syndicated sources are missing. It uses those rules to assemble historical market data for its high-tech category analyses.
